name: Fudge Filled Nutty Oatmeal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat together butter and brown sugar until creamy.
3. Add eggs, vanilla, and instant coffee; beat well.
4. Stir oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and 1 cup walnuts into the mixture. Blend until stiff (stir by hand if needed).
5. Remove 2 cups of dough and set aside. Press remaining dough into a 15½ x 10½ inch jelly roll pan.
6. For filling: Melt butter in a medium saucepan over low heat. Add chocolate; cook, stirring, until smooth.
7. Stir in sugar and sweetened condensed milk; continue cooking, stirring constantly, until thickened and sugar is dissolved.
8. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla. Spread filling over crust.
9. Sprinkle reserved dough and remaining walnuts on top.
10. Bake 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool completely in pan on wire rack. Cut into bars.
